subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Thy mention hath been recorded in the presence of the Divine Countenance, and thy letter, purified from the mention of aught save God, hath reached the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسین ذکرت لدی الوجه مذکور و کتابت مطهرا عن ذکر ما سوی الله در ساحت اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
